Sword Mastery.description: Increases ATK by 4 per level when equipping One-Handed Swords or Daggers. At max level grants +40 ATK.

Two-Handed Sword Mastery.description: Increases ATK by 4 per level when equipping Two-Handed Swords. At max level grants +40 ATK.

Increase Recuperative Power.description: Increases natural HP regeneration rate. Higher levels significantly speed up out-of-combat recovery.

Bash.description: Delivers a powerful melee strike dealing up to 500% ATK at Lv10. Levels 6–10 add a chance to Stun the target. Can be used while mounted.

Provoke.description: Forces a target into Provoke status, reducing their DEF by 5%–25% while boosting their ATK. Can also be self-cast to boost personal ATK.

Magnum Break.description: Releases a burst of Fire energy, pushing back surrounding enemies and dealing Fire-property AoE damage. Temporarily grants a 20% Fire-property boost to weapon attacks.

Endure.description: Prevents knockback and maintains movement continuity for a duration or until absorbing a set number of hits (up to 7 at Lv10). Useful for uninterrupted skill casting.

Moving HP Recovery.description: Allows HP recovery while walking. Normally HP regenerates only when stationary.

Fatal Blow.description: Adds a chance to Stun the target when Bash is used.

Auto Berserk.description: Automatically activates Provoke on the caster when HP drops below 25%, granting an ATK boost at the cost of reduced DEF.

Spear Mastery.description: Increases ATK with all Spear-type weapons by 4 per level. Grants an additional +5 ATK bonus per level when mounted on a Peco Peco.

Pierce.description: Thrusts a spear through a single target, hitting multiple times based on target size (Small: 1 hit, Medium: 2, Large: 3). Damage scales up to 100% ATK per hit.

Brandish Spear.description: Sweeps a spear in a wide arc striking all enemies in front. Deals up to 400% ATK at Lv10 in a large frontal AoE. Only usable while mounted.

Spear Stab.description: Lunges forward pushing all enemies in a straight line back while dealing up to 500% ATK. Effective for crowd control in corridors.

Spear Boomerang.description: Hurls the equipped spear at a ranged target and retrieves it, dealing up to 500% ATK at Lv5. Ranged attack that does not require the spear to leave the character.

Two-Hand Quicken.description: Temporarily increases ASPD by up to 30% when equipping a Two-Handed Sword. Duration extends with skill level.

Auto Counter.description: Parries the very next incoming melee attack and automatically delivers a Critical counter-strike against the attacker.

Bowling Bash.description: Slams a target backward into nearby enemies causing a chain knockback reaction. Deals up to 700% ATK and can chain-hit enemies in a crowd.

Riding.description: Allows mounting a Peco Peco, increasing movement speed. Adds 50% carry weight and is required to use Cavalry Mastery and mounted skills.

Cavalry Mastery.description: Reduces the ASPD penalty incurred while riding and improves the mounted ATK bonus from Spear Mastery.

One-Hand Quicken.description: Increases ASPD by up to 30% while wielding a One-Handed Sword. Requires the Spirit of the Knight (Soul Link) to activate.

Charge Attack.description: Instantly charges toward a targeted enemy anywhere on screen and attacks. Damage scales with the distance traveled.

Divine Protection.description: Increases DEF against Undead and Demon-type monsters by 5 per level (+50 DEF at Lv10).

Demon Bane.description: Increases ATK against Undead and Demon-type monsters by 3 per level (+30 ATK at Lv10).

Heal.description: Restores HP of the caster or a target ally based on INT and base level. Deals Holy-property damage to Undead-type targets instead of healing them.

Cure.description: Instantly removes Curse, Confusion (Chaos), and Silence status effects from a single target.

Faith.description: Increases Max HP by 200 per level (up to +2000) and grants 5 points of Holy-property resistance per level at Lv10.

Auto Guard.description: Passively blocks incoming physical attacks with a shield at a chance of up to 50% at Lv10. Requires a shield to be equipped.

Shield Charge.description: Rushes forward with the equipped shield to bash a single target, dealing damage and stunning for up to 2 seconds at Lv5.

Shield Boomerang.description: Launches the equipped shield at a ranged target and retrieves it, dealing up to 300% ATK based on the shield's weight and DEF.

Reflect Shield.description: Reflects a percentage of incoming melee damage back at the attacker (up to 30% at Lv10). Reflected damage scales with the equipped shield's DEF.

Holy Cross.description: Strikes a single target with a cross-shaped Holy-property attack dealing up to 350% ATK. High levels add a chance to inflict Blind.

Grand Cross.description: Creates an expanding cross of holy flame dealing Holy-property damage to all enemies in range. Also damages the caster for a portion of its power.

Devotion.description: Links to a party member within range, redirecting all damage they receive to the Crusader instead. Range and number of linkable targets increase per level.

Providence.description: Temporarily grants a target increased resistance to Holy and Demon-property damage.

Defender.description: Enters a defensive stance that massively increases DEF and MDEF at the cost of severely reduced ASPD and movement speed.

Spear Quicken.description: Increases ASPD by up to 14% and Critical rate when wielding a Spear-type weapon. Duration extends per level.

Shrink.description: Adds a knockback effect to Shield Charge, pushing the target away after the initial hit.

Aura Blade.description: Infuses the equipped Two-Handed Sword with energy, adding a fixed flat ATK bonus that bypasses DEF for its duration.

Parrying.description: Grants a chance (up to 50% at Lv10) to completely block incoming melee attacks while wielding a Two-Handed Sword, taking zero damage.

Concentration.description: Temporarily boosts ATK by up to 25% and HIT, while reducing DEF and FLEE for the duration. Also nullifies the DEF penalty from Endure.

Tension Relax.description: Massively increases SP regeneration for a short period. The character must remain seated and stationary while active.

Berserk.description: Enters a berserker rage for 5 minutes: triples ATK, maximizes ASPD, but reduces HP to 100, prevents skill and item usage, and continuously drains SP.

Spiral Pierce.description: Spins a spear in a corkscrew thrust dealing up to 500% Neutral-property ATK in 5 hits. Pierces a portion of target DEF. Requires a spear.

Head Crush.description: Strikes the target's head area, inflicting Bleeding status and dealing up to 400% ATK. Bleeding causes continuous HP loss over time.

Joint Beat.description: Attacks a joint dealing up to 600% ATK and randomly applying one of several debuffs such as movement slow, ASPD reduction, FLEE penalty, or DEF reduction.

Pressure.description: Calls down holy pressure on a single target dealing fixed Holy-property damage that bypasses DEF and cannot miss. Damage increases per level.

Sacrifice.description: Transfers own HP to deliver an attack that deals damage equal to the HP sacrificed, completely ignoring target DEF and size. Cannot kill the caster.

Gospel.description: Channels a divine sermon that randomly applies positive effects to party members and negative effects to enemies within a large AoE. Effects vary every few seconds.

Shield Chain.description: Rapidly strikes a target with the shield up to 5 times, dealing up to 500% ATK total. Damage scales with the shield's DEF.

Increase Spiritual Power.description: Increases Max SP by 6 per level (+60 SP at Lv10). An essential early skill for any caster build.

Sight.description: Reveals all enemies in Hiding or Cloaking status within a small radius around the caster for a short duration.

Napalm Beat.description: Fires a Ghost-property magical explosion at a single target that also damages up to 8 surrounding enemies. SP cost is low, making it a good AoE spam skill.

Safety Wall.description: Erects an invisible barrier on a target cell that absorbs up to (Lv+1) incoming physical attacks before disappearing. Requires Blue Gemstone.

Soul Strike.description: Fires 1–5 Ghost-property spirit bolts at a single target. Extremely effective against Undead monsters.

Cold Bolt.description: Fires 1–10 Water-property ice bolts at a single target. Each bolt deals individual magical damage.

Frost Diver.description: Fires a water missile at a target with a chance to Freeze them. Freeze changes the target's property to Water and prevents movement.

Stone Curse.description: Has a chance to Petrify a single target, immobilizing them and changing their element to Earth. Petrified targets take increased damage from Wind attacks.

Fire Ball.description: Launches a fireball that explodes on impact dealing Fire-property damage to the target and surrounding enemies in a 3x3 AoE.

Fire Wall.description: Summons a wall of fire across 3–10 cells that burns and knocks back enemies passing through it. Duration and cell count increase per level.

Fire Bolt.description: Fires 1–10 Fire-property flame bolts at a single target. One of the core offensive spells for Mage and Wizard.

Lightning Bolt.description: Fires 1–10 Wind-property lightning bolts at a single target. Each bolt deals individual magical damage.

Thunder Storm.description: Calls down a barrage of 1–10 Wind-property lightning bolts over a 5x5 target area, hitting all enemies within.

Energy Coat.description: Surrounds the caster in an energy barrier that reduces incoming physical damage by 30%, consuming SP per hit absorbed.

Fire Pillar.description: Plants a Fire-property magical trap that erupts in a fiery pillar when an enemy steps on it, dealing Fire AoE damage multiple times.

Sightrasher.description: Launches multiple fireballs outward in all directions around the caster, hitting all enemies within Sight's range. Requires Sight to be active first.

Meteor Storm.description: Calls down a relentless barrage of meteors over a large AoE, each dealing Fire-property damage with a chance to Stun. Number of meteors and duration increase per level.

Jupitel Thunder.description: Fires a massive sphere of Wind-property energy that knocks the target back and deals heavy damage. Useful for interrupting casters and PvP.

Lord of Vermillion.description: Summons continuous pillars of lightning over a large AoE dealing Wind-property damage to all enemies. Has a chance to inflict Blind. Expensive but powerful.

Water Ball.description: Fires multiple Water-property water globes at a target. Potency increases greatly when cast on a water surface. Can hit up to 9 times near large water pools.

Ice Wall.description: Creates a wall of ice blocks across a row of cells to obstruct enemy movement. Wall HP and duration increase per level.

Frost Nova.description: Releases a shockwave of freezing energy in all directions around the caster, dealing Water-property damage and Freezing nearby enemies.

Storm Gust.description: Summons a devastating blizzard over a large AoE, continuously dealing Water-property damage. Enemies hit multiple times have increasing chances of being Frozen.

Earth Spike.description: Summons Earth-property spikes beneath a single target dealing Earth-property magical damage across multiple hits.

Heaven's Drive.description: Erupts the ground under a target 5x5 area with Earth-property spikes. Also destroys traps placed in the area.

Quagmire.description: Transforms a target cell into sticky mud, reducing the AGI and DEX of any enemy standing within the area. Cancels Speed Potions and AGI-UP effects.

Monster Property.description: Increases magical damage dealt to specific monster properties based on skill level. Improves effectiveness against common monster types.

Sight Blaster.description: When Sight is active, it automatically attacks the first hidden enemy revealed, dealing damage and removing the hidden status.

Advanced Book.description: Increases ATK when wielding Book-type weapons and reduces cast time for specific skills when a book is equipped.

Cast Cancel.description: Immediately cancels an ongoing skill cast in progress, recovering a portion of its SP cost. Useful for avoiding wasted casts.

Magic Rod.description: Intercepts a magic spell being cast on the caster, absorbing the SP that would have been consumed and recovering it for the Sage instead.

Spell Breaker.description: Disrupts a target's ongoing skill cast, stealing the SP it would have consumed and granting it to the Sage.

Free Cast.description: Allows the caster to move freely during skill casting at a reduced movement speed. Essential for kiting while casting.

Auto Spell.description: Memorizes a low-level offensive bolt skill. When active, grants a chance to automatically cast that skill upon each physical attack.

Flame Launcher.description: Temporarily enchants an ally's weapon with the Fire element for the skill's duration.

Frost Weapon.description: Temporarily enchants an ally's weapon with the Water element for the skill's duration.

Lightning Loader.description: Temporarily enchants an ally's weapon with the Wind element for the skill's duration.

Seismic Weapon.description: Temporarily enchants an ally's weapon with the Earth element for the skill's duration.

Dragonology.description: Increases INT and bonus ATK against Dragon-type monsters per level. Also slightly increases Max SP.

Volcano.description: Enchants a ground area with Fire, boosting Fire-property damage dealt from that location and weakening Frozen targets in the zone.

Deluge.description: Enchants a ground area with Water, creating a pool that powers up Water Ball and other water-based interactions.

Violent Gale.description: Enchants a ground area with Wind, boosting Wind-property damage from that location.

Land Protector.description: Creates a neutral ground field that nullifies all ground-targeted magic (such as Safety Wall, Storm Gust, and Ankle Snare) within the area.

Dispell.description: Strips all active buff skills from a target. Does not remove equipment-based effects or status ailments. Ineffective on boss monsters.

Abracadabra.description: Randomly selects and casts a skill from a large internal pool, consuming 2 Yellow Gemstones. Effects range from helpful to catastrophic — unpredictable by design.

Create Elemental Converter.description: Crafts a set of Elemental Converter items (Flame, Frost, Seismic, or Lightning) that can be used to temporarily change a character's weapon property.

Elemental Change (Water).description: Changes the targeted monster's current element to Water property, making it weak to Wind and Thunder attacks.

Elemental Change (Earth).description: Changes the targeted monster's current element to Earth property.

Elemental Change (Fire).description: Changes the targeted monster's current element to Fire property, making it weak to Water and Cold attacks.

Elemental Change (Wind).description: Changes the targeted monster's current element to Wind property, making it weak to Earth attacks.

Soul Drain.description: Recovers SP equal to the slain monster's base level whenever a magic offensive skill delivers the killing blow.

Magic Crasher.description: Delivers a physical weapon attack that deals magical (INT-based) damage instead of physical damage. Bypasses physical DEF in favor of MDEF.

Amplify Magic Power.description: Dramatically amplifies the power of the next magic skill cast by up to 50% additional MATK. Consumes the buff after one cast.

Napalm Vulcan.description: Fires multiple Ghost-property napalm bolts that hit up to 3–5 enemies in the target area, each dealing Ghost-property damage.

Ganbantein.description: Removes all active ground-targeting magic effects (Pneuma, Safety Wall, Storm Gust, Land Protector, etc.) in a target area. Requires 1 Yellow and 1 Blue Gemstone.

Gravitation Field.description: Creates a gravity well at a target location that slows all enemies inside and continuously deals Neutral-property damage per second. Requires two gemstones.

Health Conversion.description: Sacrifices a portion of current HP to restore SP. Conversion rate and amount improve with skill level.

Soul Change.description: Swaps the current SP values between the caster and a target party member or enemy. Useful for draining or restoring SP depending on context.

Soul Burn.description: Drains all remaining SP from a target, dealing damage equal to double the SP removed. Highly effective against high-SP targets.

Mind Breaker.description: Reduces a target's MDEF while simultaneously increasing their MATK. Makes them more vulnerable to magic but also more dangerous as casters.

Memorize.description: Allows the next 5 skill casts to be performed at half cast time. Excellent for rapid high-cast-time spell combos.

Wall of Fog.description: Creates a horizontal mist barrier that blocks ranged attacks passing through it. Enemies walking through have a chance to be Blinded.

Spider Web.description: Binds a target in place using a magical web (similar to Ankle Snare) and changes their element to Fire, making them vulnerable to Fire attacks.

Double Casting.description: Grants a chance per level to automatically cast the same bolt spell a second time immediately after the initial cast, at no additional cost.

Owl's Eye.description: Increases DEX by 1 per level (+10 DEX at Lv10), improving ranged accuracy and cast speed.

Vulture's Eye.description: Increases the effective attack range of Bow-type weapons by 1 cell per level and adds bonus CRIT rate when attacking from maximum range.

Attention Concentrate.description: Temporarily raises DEX and AGI, improving ranged attack accuracy and FLEE. Does not stack with AGI UP or similar buffs.

Double Strafing.description: Fires two arrows simultaneously at a single target, dealing up to 380% ATK at Lv10. Works with any bow-type weapon.

Arrow Shower.description: Fires a spread of arrows covering a 5x5 cell area, hitting all enemies within. AoE crowd control tool for clearing grouped monsters.

Making Arrow.description: Opens a crafting menu allowing the conversion of various materials (ores, feathers, plant materials) into usable arrows.

Charge Arrow.description: Fires a single heavy arrow that knocks the target back several cells. Useful for interrupting enemies or creating distance.

Skid Trap.description: Sets an invisible trap that knocks the triggering enemy back several cells. Useful for kiting and controlling monster paths.

Land Mine.description: Sets an Earth-property explosive trap that detonates on contact, dealing AoE physical damage to all enemies in range.

Ankle Snare.description: Sets a trap that immobilizes the first enemy to trigger it. Immobilization duration decreases with target's AGI and level.

Shockwave Trap.description: Sets a trap that drains a significant portion of SP from the triggering target. Effective for disabling enemy casters.

Sandman.description: Sets a trap that causes Sleep status to enemies in a small AoE when triggered. Sleeping targets wake when attacked.

Flasher.description: Sets a trap that Blinds enemies in a small AoE when triggered. Blind reduces HIT and FLEE significantly.

Freezing Trap.description: Sets a Water-property trap that Freezes the triggering target, preventing movement and changing their property to Water.

Blast Mine.description: Sets a Wind-property delayed-blast trap that detonates after a short fuse, dealing heavy Wind AoE damage to enemies in range.

Claymore Trap.description: Sets a powerful Fire-property triggered trap that explodes on contact, dealing massive Fire AoE damage across a large radius.

Remove Trap.description: Dismantles a trap placed on the ground, returning the item used to create it.

Talkie Box.description: Deploys a box that plays a recorded message when an enemy triggers it. Primarily a novelty skill with limited practical use.

Beast Bane.description: Increases ATK against Brute and Insect-type monsters by 4 per level (+40 ATK at Lv10). Highly effective in many hunting maps.

Falconry Mastery.description: Enables the hunter to equip and control a Falcon companion, unlocking all Falcon-based skills.

Steel Crow.description: Increases the damage dealt by the Falcon in Blitz Beat and Falcon Assault by 6 per level.

Blitz Beat.description: Commands the Falcon to attack a target and nearby enemies up to 5 times, dealing Wind-property damage. Damage is based on INT and Steel Crow level.

Detecting.description: Commands the Falcon to scan a wide area, revealing all hidden enemies (Hiding, Cloaking) within range. Area of detection increases per level.

Spring Trap.description: Commands the Falcon to retrieve a ground trap, removing it safely without triggering it. Can collect traps placed by the Hunter or allies.

Beast Strafing.description: Performs an enhanced version of Double Strafing with an improved damage multiplier specifically against Brute-type monsters. Requires Hunter Spirit Link.

Phantasmic Arrow.description: Fires a magical arrow that pierces through all enemies in a straight line, hitting each one it passes through.

Adaptation to Circumstances.description: Immediately cancels any currently active Song or Dance performance, freeing the character from its constraints.

Encore.description: Re-performs the last Song or Dance used without consuming the associated gemstone or reagent cost.

Lullaby.description: Both a Bard and Dancer must perform together. Puts all nearby enemies to Sleep. Sleeping targets wake when attacked.

Mr. Kim A Rich Man.description: Ensemble skill performed by Bard and Dancer together. Grants a bonus experience multiplier to all party members within the AoE.

Eternal Chaos.description: Ensemble skill that removes all VIT DEF from enemies within the area of effect, making them vulnerable to physical damage.

A Drum on the Battlefield.description: Ensemble skill that increases the ATK and DEF of all party members within range for the duration of the performance.

The Ring of Nibelungen.description: Ensemble skill that grants Double Attack to all party members within the performance area.

Loki's Veil.description: Ensemble skill that seals all skill usage (both allies and enemies) within the AoE for the performance duration.

Into the Abyss.description: Ensemble skill that grants SP recovery over time to all party members within the performance zone.

Invulnerable Siegfried.description: Ensemble skill granting very high elemental (Fire, Water, Wind, Earth) and status resistance to all party members inside the AoE.

Musical Lesson.description: Increases ATK when equipping Instrument-type weapons and boosts the damage of Musical Strike per level.

Musical Strike.description: Uses the equipped instrument as a ranged attack, striking a target multiple times. Damage scales with Musical Lesson level.

Dissonance.description: Performs a discordant song that periodically deals non-elemental magic damage to all enemies within range. Duration increases per level.

Frost Joker.description: Performs a comedic routine that Freezes all enemies within a very wide AoE. Duration and success rate scale with skill level.

A Whistle.description: Performs a whistling song that increases AGI and FLEE of all party members within range for the performance duration.

Assassin Cross of Sunset.description: Performs a harrowing ballad that increases the ASPD of all party members within range. Higher levels grant greater ASPD boost.

A Poem of Bragi.description: Performs an epic poem that reduces variable cast time and after-cast delay for all party members within range. Essential support skill in party play.

The Apple of Idun.description: Performs a healing melody that increases Max HP and HP regeneration rate of all party members within range.

Pang Voice.description: Shouts with supernatural force, inflicting Chaos (Confusion) status on all enemies within a wide AoE.

Dancing Lesson.description: Increases ATK when equipping Whip-type weapons and boosts the damage multiplier of Throw Arrow per level.

Throw Arrow.description: Hurls arrows at a single target dealing physical ranged damage across multiple hits. Scales with DEX and Dancing Lesson.

Ugly Dance.description: Performs a jarring dance routine that continuously drains SP from all enemies within range. Effective against enemy casters in PvP.

Scream.description: Releases a powerful scream causing Stun status on all enemies in a wide AoE around the caster.

Humming.description: Performs a humming dance that increases the HIT rate of all party members within the AoE for the duration.

Please Don't Forget Me.description: Performs a clinging dance that reduces ASPD and movement speed of all enemies within the performance zone.

Fortune's Kiss.description: Performs a lucky dance that increases the Critical rate of all party members within range.

Service for You.description: Performs a serving dance that increases Max SP and SP regeneration for all party members within range.

Wink of Charm.description: Charms nearby male characters and monsters, inflicting Chaos status on them.

True Sight.description: Temporarily boosts STR, AGI, VIT, INT, DEX, and LUK, plus significantly increases Critical rate. A powerful all-around combat buff.

Falcon Assault.description: Commands the Falcon to deliver a concentrated high-damage assault on a single target, dealing Wind-property damage. Shares a cooldown with Blitz Beat.

Sharp Shooting.description: Fires a single ultra-powerful arrow in a straight line that pierces through and damages up to 3 enemies in sequence.

Wind Walk.description: Increases movement speed and FLEE rate for the caster and all party members in range for an extended duration. Great for traversal and kiting.

Arrow Vulcan.description: Fires 9 rapid arrow shots in quick succession at a single target, dealing massive combined ATK-based ranged damage. Requires an instrument or whip.

Moonlit Water Mill.description: Ensemble skill performed by Clown and Gypsy together. Cloaks all party members within the AoE, granting them invisibility.

Marionette Control.description: Links to a target party member, transferring exactly half of the Clown/Gypsy's stat bonuses to them. Caster's effective stats are halved during the link.

Longing for Freedom.description: Allows the performer to move while actively performing a Song or Dance, at reduced movement speed. Higher levels increase movement speed.

Wand of Hermode.description: Performs a powerful song that removes all buff skills from everyone within range, including allies. Grants magic immunity while the song plays.

Tarot Card of Fate.description: Draws a random Tarot card that applies various effects to the targeted enemy — effects include damage, status ailments, attribute reductions, or instant death.

Skillful Professional Musician.description: Extends the duration of Songs and Dances and increases their area of effect and potency per level.

Enlarge Weight Limit.description: Increases maximum carry weight capacity by 200 per level (+2000 at Lv10), allowing more items to be carried before becoming over-weight.

Discount.description: Reduces prices when buying items from NPC shops by up to 24% at Lv10.

Overcharge.description: Increases Zeny earned when selling items to NPC shops by up to 24% at Lv10.

Pushcart.description: Enables use of a Pushcart for additional item storage (up to 8000 weight). Higher levels increase the cart's weight capacity.

Identify.description: Identifies a single unidentified item without consuming a Magnifier. Convenient alternative to using the item itself.

Vending.description: Opens a player-run shop to sell items directly to other players. Higher levels allow displaying more items simultaneously (up to 12 at Lv10).

Mammonite.description: Sacrifices Zeny to deliver a powerful melee strike. Damage and Zeny cost both scale with skill level. At Lv10, deals 1000% ATK but costs significant gold.

Cart Revolution.description: Smashes the Pushcart into surrounding enemies, dealing physical AoE damage and knocking them back. Damage scales with cart's current weight load.

Change Cart.description: Changes the visual appearance of the equipped Pushcart. Purely cosmetic.

Loud Exclamation.description: Permanently increases STR by 4 through enthusiastic shouting training.

Buying Store.description: Opens a buyer's shop where other players can sell specified items to you at set prices.

Cart Decoration.description: Applies decorative accessories to the Pushcart. Primarily cosmetic with minor gameplay bonuses at higher levels.

Iron Tempering.description: Enables crafting of Iron ingots and iron-based equipment. Success rate improves with each level.

Steel Tempering.description: Enables crafting of Steel and steel-forged weapons. Required for higher-tier smithing.

Enchanted Stone Craft.description: Enables creation of elemental stones used in enchanting weapons with elemental properties.

Research Oridecon.description: Increases the success rate when upgrading weapons using Oridecon. Reduces upgrade failure risk.

Smith Dagger.description: Crafts a dagger-type weapon. Each level allows access to a higher tier of dagger.

Smith Sword.description: Crafts a one-handed sword-type weapon. Each level allows crafting higher-tier swords.

Smith Brass Knuckle.description: Crafts a knuckle-type weapon for use by Monks and Alchemists.

Smith Spear.description: Crafts a spear-type weapon for use by Knights and Crusaders.

Hilt Binding.description: Permanently increases ATK by 1% when equipping Two-Handed Swords and slightly reduces cooldowns on certain skills.

Finding Ore.description: Grants a chance to find ore items (Iron Ore, Rough Oridecon, etc.) when defeating monsters in melee combat.

Weaponry Research.description: Increases HIT by 2 and ATK by 2 per level when wielding weapons you have mastery in. Rewards using class-appropriate gear.

Repair Weapon.description: Restores a broken weapon to working condition using repair materials. Requires specific materials depending on the weapon type.

Skin Tempering.description: Hardens the skin against elemental attacks, reducing Fire-property damage by 5% and Neutral damage by 1% per level at max.

Hammer Fall.description: Slams the ground with a powerful weapon strike, dealing physical damage to all enemies in range with a chance to Stun them.

Adrenaline Rush.description: Temporarily increases ASPD by up to 30% for all party members equipping Axes or Maces. Duration extends per level.

Weapon Perfection.description: Temporarily negates weapon size penalty for all party members for the skill duration, allowing full damage against any target size.

Over Thrust.description: Temporarily boosts ATK by up to 25% for the caster or a targeted party member. Only affects the single target.

Maximize Power.description: Causes every weapon attack to deal maximum possible damage at the cost of continuous SP drain per second while active.

Full Adrenaline Rush.description: Extends the Adrenaline Rush effect to all weapon types for all party members, not just Axes and Maces. Requires Blacksmith Spirit Link.

Unfair Trick.description: Reduces the minimum weight required in the Pushcart for Cart Revolution to deal maximum damage.

Greed.description: Automatically picks up all items dropped on the ground within a small radius of the caster in one action.

Axe Mastery.description: Increases ATK when equipping One-Handed or Two-Handed Axe-type weapons by 3 per level.

Learning Potion.description: Increases HP/SP restored by thrown and self-used healing potions. Also improves the potency of Potion Pitcher.

Pharmacy.description: Uses chemical knowledge to create various potions and items. Success rate and available recipes increase with skill level.

Demonstration.description: Throws a flaming Molotov-style cocktail, creating a Fire-property burning AoE at the target location that damages any enemy walking through it.

Acid Terror.description: Throws corrosive acid at a target, dealing damage with a chance to permanently break their armor and inflict Bleeding status.

Potion Pitcher.description: Throws a healing potion to restore HP of a targeted party member. Healing potency scales with Learning Potion level.

Bio Cannibalize.description: Plants a flower or mushroom-type monster to fight on behalf of the Alchemist. Type of plant varies with skill level.

Sphere Mine.description: Deploys a volatile sphere at a target location that explodes when enemies approach, dealing Neutral-property AoE damage.

Chemical Protection Weapon.description: Coats a target's weapon with a chemical seal, preventing it from being broken or stripped for the duration.

Chemical Protection Shield.description: Coats a target's shield with a chemical seal, preventing it from being broken or stripped for the duration.

Chemical Protection Armor.description: Coats a target's armor with a chemical seal, preventing it from being broken or stripped for the duration.

Chemical Protection Helm.description: Coats a target's headgear with a chemical seal, preventing it from being broken or stripped for the duration.

Bioethics.description: Unlocks the ethical framework for life-form research, enabling use of Homunculus-related skills (Call Homunculus, Rest, Resurrect Homunculus).

Call Homunculus.description: Summons the Alchemist's Homunculus companion from its vial. The Homunculus fights alongside the Alchemist and can be leveled up.

Rest.description: Returns the active Homunculus to its vial, preserving its status. Use Resurrect Homunculus to recall it if it dies.

Resurrect Homunculus.description: Revives a dead Homunculus and recalls it from the vial, restoring a portion of its HP based on skill level.

Berserk Pitcher.description: Throws potions at significantly reduced SP cost and at an accelerated rate. Requires Alchemist Spirit Link.

Twilight Alchemy I.description: Instantly creates 200 White Potions using stored materials. Requires Alchemist Spirit Link and sufficient ingredients.

Twilight Alchemy II.description: Instantly creates 200 Slim White Potions. Requires Alchemist Spirit Link.

Twilight Alchemy III.description: Instantly creates 100 Alcohol and 50 Acid Bottles. Requires Alchemist Spirit Link.

Melt Down.description: Delivers a weapon strike with a chance to break the target's weapon and/or armor, reducing their combat effectiveness.

Cart Boost.description: Uses the Pushcart like a vehicle to temporarily increase movement speed. Higher levels provide faster and longer boosts.

Weapon Refine.description: Attempts to upgrade a weapon by one refinement level using the required materials and Zeny. Success rate increases with skill level up to safe limits.

Cart Termination.description: Charges at high speed and drives the Pushcart into a single target, dealing massive physical damage. Damage scales with cart weight and ATK.

Maximum Over Thrust.description: Activates an enhanced Over Thrust that covers the entire party and applies to all weapon types. Has a small chance to break the wielder's own weapon.

Slim Potion Pitcher.description: Throws a healing potion that restores HP to all party members within range simultaneously, unlike single-target Potion Pitcher.

Full Chemical Protection.description: Applies all four Chemical Protection effects (Weapon, Shield, Armor, Helm) to a single target in one action.

Acid Demonstration.description: Launches a powerful bomb combining acid and an explosive, dealing massive Neutral-property damage based on the target's VIT and current DEF. Ignores damage reduction.

Plant Cultivation.description: Grows a mushroom (Lv1) or plant (Lv2) by throwing a seed. These can be used for Homunculus feeding, chemistry experiments, or combat support.

Ruwach.description: Reveals all enemies using Hiding or Cloaking within a small radius of the caster, dealing minor Holy-property damage to revealed Undead.

Pneuma.description: Creates an invisible divine barrier on a single cell that nullifies all ranged-type physical projectile attacks on that location. Lasts 10 seconds.

Teleportation.description: Lv1 teleports to a random location on the current map. Lv2 opens a menu to teleport to a saved Warp Portal destination.

Warp Portal.description: Creates a portal to a previously visited town. Requires Blue Gemstone. Higher levels unlock more saved destination slots (up to 4 at Lv4).

Increase Agility.description: Temporarily increases the target's AGI and movement speed for an extended duration. One of the most valuable buff skills in the game.

Decrease Agility.description: Reduces the target's AGI and movement speed. Effective for slowing enemy approach or reducing their FLEE rate.

Aqua Benedicta.description: When standing in water, creates a Holy Water item which is required for Aspersio, Turn Undead, and Magnus Exorcismus.

Signum Crucis.description: Reduces the MDEF of all Undead and Demon-property monsters within range by 10%–50%, making them more vulnerable to holy magic.

Angelus.description: Increases the VIT DEF bonus of all party members within range for a duration. Stacks with equipment and other buffs.

Blessing.description: Temporarily increases a target's STR, DEX, and INT. Also removes Curse status. One of the most commonly requested support buffs.

Holy Light.description: Fires a single bolt of Holy-property energy at a target. Learned via quest; deals moderate Holy-property damage.

Resurrection.description: Revives a dead party member with a portion of their base EXP preserved based on skill level. Lv4 fully preserves EXP. Requires Blue Gemstone.

Mace Mastery.description: Increases ATK when equipping Mace-type weapons by 3 per level.

Impositio Manus.description: Increases the ATK of the target by 5 per level (up to +25 at Lv5) for a set duration.

Suffragium.description: Reduces the variable cast time of the next skill used by the target by 15%–45%. Must be cast before the target begins their skill.

Aspersio.description: Temporarily endows a target's weapon with the Holy element, making all their attacks Holy-property. Requires Holy Water.

Benedictio Sanctissimi Sacramenti.description: Requires both a Priest and 2 Acolytes. Creates an AoE field that repeatedly deals Holy damage to Undead while recovering HP of living allies.

Sanctuary.description: Creates a blessed area on the ground that continuously restores HP to all party members and damages Undead. Requires Blue Gemstone at higher levels.

Slow Poison.description: Stabilizes Poison status on a target, preventing HP drain from Poison without removing the status itself. Useful for keeping targets poisoned safely.

Recovery.description: Cures Petrification and Frozen status from a target, also restoring a portion of HP.

Kyrie Eleison.description: Places a protective barrier on the target that absorbs a number of physical attacks (up to 10 at Lv10), each absorbing up to 30% of Max HP in damage.

Magnificat.description: Doubles the SP regeneration rate for all party members within range for a duration. Duration increases per level.

Gloria.description: Temporarily increases the LUK of all party members within range by up to 30, improving Critical rate and item drop chances.

Lex Divina.description: Silences the target, preventing skill usage for a duration. Can also be used to remove Silence from a friendly target.

Turn Undead.description: Attempts to instantly destroy an Undead-type target with divine power. Success chance scales with skill level, INT, LUK, and target's level.

Lex Aeterna.description: Marks a target so the very next attack (by anyone) deals exactly double damage. Extremely powerful for boss burst sequences.

Magnus Exorcismus.description: Creates a large holy circle on the ground that continuously deals Holy-property damage to Undead and Demon monsters. Requires 1 Blue Gemstone.

Redemptio.description: Sacrifices the Priest's life to revive all dead party members within range, each with 50% HP and 0 SP. The Priest loses 1% base EXP per revived player.

Iron Hand.description: Increases ATK when fighting bare-handed or with Knuckle-type weapons by 3 per level.

Spirits Recovery.description: Increases natural HP and SP regeneration rates while spirit spheres are present. Regeneration improves per spirit sphere held.

Call Spirits.description: Summons a spirit sphere to orbit the caster. Up to 5 spheres can be maintained simultaneously. Required for most advanced Monk skills.

Absorb Spirits.description: Destroys all current spirit spheres and recovers SP proportional to the number absorbed.

Triple Attack.description: Grants a chance to automatically chain a 3-hit combo with each basic melee attack. Hit count and damage multiplier scale with level.

Body Relocation.description: Instantly leaps to a target location within range, bypassing obstacles. Consumes 1 spirit sphere.

Dodge.description: Permanently increases FLEE by 3 per level, improving the chance to evade physical attacks.

Investigate.description: A focused punch that ignores a portion of the target's DEF. Damage increases with each spirit sphere held at time of cast.

Finger Offensive.description: Fires up to 5 spirit spheres as projectiles at a target or group of enemies, each dealing physical damage. Consumes all active spheres.

Steel Body.description: Enters an iron-hard defensive stance: massively increases DEF and MDEF but reduces ASPD to 1 and movement speed to walking. Lasts until HP drops very low.

Blade Stop.description: Parries the next melee attack, locking both the caster and attacker in place temporarily. Enables follow-up combos while frozen in place.

Critical Explosion.description: Temporarily increases Critical rate significantly and enters a Spirit Explosion state where combo skills are powered up. Consumes all spirit spheres.

Asura Strike.description: The Monk's ultimate skill: expends all spirit spheres and all remaining SP to deliver a single colossal melee blow with damage based on SP consumed. Leaves the caster with 1 SP.

Chain Combo.description: Performs a rapid 4-hit melee combo that deals up to 400% ATK total. Can be followed up with Combo Finish.

Combo Finish.description: A powerful combo finisher executed after Chain Combo, dealing a heavy single blow up to 720% ATK at Lv5.

Ki Translation.description: Transfers one spirit sphere from the caster to a targeted Monk ally.

Ki Explosion.description: Releases all spirit spheres in a shockwave explosion that deals AoE damage to surrounding enemies.

Assumptio.description: Doubles the physical and magical DEF of a single target for a duration. Extraordinarily powerful in boss fights.

Basilica.description: Creates a 5x5 divine sanctuary. Monsters cannot enter the area, and players inside are protected from monster aggression. Caster cannot move while performing.

Meditatio.description: Increases Max SP by 3% per level, SP regeneration rate, and the amount restored by each cast of Heal.

Mana Recharge.description: Reduces SP cost of all Priest and High Priest skills, enabling longer sustained support performance.

Palm Push Strike.description: An open-palm strike that launches the target backward. Damage increases with each spirit sphere held. Useful for repositioning enemies.

Tiger Knuckle Fist.description: A concentrated strike dealing up to 500% ATK at Lv5. Damage is further increased by spirit spheres held at cast time.

Chain Crush Combo.description: An extended version of Combo Finish delivering a devastating multi-hit sequence dealing up to 1200% ATK across multiple blows.

Dangerous Soul Collect.description: Rapidly calls up to 5 spirit spheres in quick succession without cooldown. Useful before Asura Strike or Spirit-dependent skills.

Double Attack.description: Grants a chance to deal two simultaneous hits with Dagger-type weapons. At Lv10, activates at a 50% chance per attack.

Increase Dodge.description: Permanently increases FLEE by 3 per level (+30 FLEE at Lv10), making the Thief naturally elusive.

Steal.description: Attempts to steal a random item from a monster's drop table. Only one steal attempt per monster. Success rate improves with DEX and skill level.

Hiding.description: Conceals the caster from most enemies, enabling stealthy movement. Duration increases per level. Revealed by Sight, Ruwach, Detecting, and Insect/Demon monsters.

Envenom.description: Stabs the target with a poisoned blade, dealing physical damage and having a chance to inflict Poison status. Poison causes continuous HP loss.

Detoxify.description: Removes Poison status from the caster or a targeted party member.

Sprinkle Sand.description: Throws sand into a target's eyes, inflicting Blind status which drastically reduces HIT and FLEE.

Back Sliding.description: Instantly slides backward 5 cells without turning around, useful for creating distance in combat.

Pick Stone.description: Picks up a stone from the ground to use as a projectile.

Throw Stone.description: Throws a stone at a target dealing minor damage with a small chance to Stun.

Right-Hand Mastery.description: Increases ATK of the right-hand weapon when dual-wielding daggers by 20% per level (up to 100% at Lv5).

Left-Hand Mastery.description: Increases ATK of the left-hand weapon when dual-wielding by 10% per level (up to 50% at Lv5).

Katar Mastery.description: Increases ATK when equipping Katar-type weapons by 3 per level. Also doubles the Critical rate while a Katar is equipped.

Cloaking.description: Provides near-invisibility while near walls. Allows limited movement. Duration and walking speed increase with level. Dropped when moving away from walls (low levels).

Sonic Blow.description: Rapidly strikes a target 8 times in a whirlwind of blows, dealing up to 800% ATK total at Lv10. One of the highest burst-damage skills in the game.

Grimtooth.description: Attacks a target through their Hiding state, dealing physical AoE damage to that target and nearby enemies simultaneously.

Enchant Poison.description: Temporarily coats the caster's weapon in Poison, changing its property and adding a chance to inflict Poison on each hit.

Poison React.description: Creates a reactive trigger: the next Poison-property attack received causes the caster to automatically counter-attack. High levels counter more times.

Venom Dust.description: Creates a cloud of poison on a cell that lingers, inflicting Poison on enemies that walk through it. Duration increases per level.

Venom Splasher.description: Attaches a ticking poison bomb to a target. After a short countdown it explodes, dealing AoE Poison-property damage to the target and nearby enemies.

Sonic Acceleration.description: Increases the damage multiplier of Sonic Blow by an additional 10%.

Throw Venom Knife.description: Throws a Venom Knife at a ranged target, dealing physical damage and applying Poison status.

Snatcher.description: Passively attempts to steal an item from monsters with each physical attack. Stacks with the regular Steal skill usage.

Steal Coin.description: Steals Zeny directly from a monster. Amount stolen scales with the monster's Zeny drops and skill level.

Back Stab.description: Strikes the target from behind dealing massive damage up to 700% ATK at Lv10. Must be performed from behind the enemy; always deals Critical damage when successful.

Tunnel Drive.description: Enables movement while in Hiding status. Movement speed in Hiding increases with each level.

Raid.description: Leaps out of Hiding to attack surrounding enemies in an AoE, dealing physical damage with a chance to inflict Stun and Blind.

Strip Weapon.description: Temporarily disarms the target, removing their equipped weapon for up to 90 seconds. Duration and success rate scale with level.

Strip Shield.description: Temporarily removes the target's equipped shield. Duration and success rate scale with level.

Strip Armor.description: Temporarily removes the target's equipped body armor. Highly effective in PvP.

Strip Helm.description: Temporarily removes the target's equipped headgear. Duration and success rate scale with level.

Intimidate.description: Teleports both the Rogue and the target to a random location on the map. Also deals damage. Effective disruption tool in PvP.

Graffiti.description: Writes a short message as graffiti on a ground cell. The message is visible to all nearby players.

Flag Graffiti.description: Marks a ground cell with the Rogue's guild flag.

Cleaner.description: Removes graffiti text or flags from a cell.

Gangster's Paradise.description: When two or more Rogues/Stalkers are sitting together, all become immune to normal monster aggression (non-Boss monsters will not auto-attack them).

Compulsion Discount.description: Slightly reduces NPC shop prices when buying items. A weaker version of the Merchant's Discount skill.

Plagiarism.description: Copies the last offensive skill used against the Rogue, allowing a single use of that skill. Higher levels allow copying higher-level skills.

Close Confine.description: Physically restrains a target, preventing both the Rogue and the target from moving or using teleport skills. Ends if either party is killed or 10 seconds pass.

Advanced Katar Research.description: Dramatically increases Critical rate by 5 per level and Critical damage by 2% per level when using Katar-type weapons.

Enchant Deadly Poison.description: Coats the weapon in an extremely potent Deadly Poison that massively amplifies all damage dealt per hit. Requires Deadly Poison items.

Soul Breaker.description: Combines a physical strike and a magic bolt simultaneously against one target, dealing combined ATK and MATK-based damage. Has a chance to Stun.

Meteor Assault.description: Unleashes a spinning assault that hits all enemies in range, dealing physical AoE damage with chances to inflict Stun, Blind, or Stasis.

Create Deadly Poison.description: Crafts the rare Deadly Poison item using specific rare materials. Required for Enchant Deadly Poison.

Chase Walk.description: Enters Hiding while walking, allowing stealthy movement without wall proximity. Increases movement speed in this state per level and allows storing a copied skill.

Reject Sword.description: Activates a parry that reflects a portion of incoming sword-type weapon damage back to the attacker for 3 hits. Reflection percentage increases per level.

Preserve.description: Locks the currently stored Plagiarism skill in place, preventing it from being overwritten by new attacks.

Full Strip.description: Simultaneously strips all four equipment slots (Weapon, Shield, Armor, Helm) from the target in a single action. Success rate scales with DEX and skill level.
